name: Quandrix Unlimited
desc: X-spells and +1/+1 counters in one tight package. Zimone makes X-spells cheaper as she grows, and nearly every payoff in the deck scales with mana. Pure Simic ramp into haymakers.

name: Silverquill Influence
desc: Auras on opponents' creatures to goad them into attacking each other while you draw cards. Highest reprint value of the Strixhaven cycle. Political and passive-aggressive.

name: Prismari Artistry
desc: Cast expensive spells; generate a proportionally huge Elemental token each upkeep. Rewards you for going big instead of going wide. Pairs with the new Prepared mechanic.

name: Lorehold Spirit
desc: Create Spirits as cards leave your graveyard, then buff them to close out. A unique Boros graveyard strategy — not typical aggro. Heavy on first-time reprints.

name: Witherbloom Pestilence
desc: Create Pests and sacrifice them for life, cards, and stackable counters. Classic Golgari attrition tuned for Strixhaven's biology department.

name: Turtle Power!
desc: Five-color go-wide with +1/+1 counters on turtles, mutants, and ninjas. Character Select mechanic lets you partner Leonardo with any of the other four turtles or Splinter.

name: Dance of the Elements
desc: Cheat big Elementals in with evoke, then sacrifice and copy them for value. Includes Fury, Endurance, and a first-ever reprint of Timeless Lotus.

name: Blight Curse
desc: Spread -1/-1 counters to grind opponents out, then steal their weakened creatures. Jund attrition. Necroskitter, Massacre Girl, Flourishing Defenses included.

name: Counter Intelligence
desc: Artifacts and proliferate in Jeskai colors, with spacecraft-as-commander. Reprint value well above MSRP. EDHREC grade A.

name: World Shaper
desc: Sacrifice lands to grow a seedship, then drain opponents when lands die. One-shot kill potential with Sylvan Safekeeper.

name: Revival Trance
desc: Mardu reanimator focused on small-power creatures (3 or less) — Terra returns them when she deals combat damage. FF6 World of Ruin flavor.

name: Limit Break
desc: Equipment-focused Naya voltron — push creatures to 7+ power with Swords of X and Y. Tutors for weapons, buffs attackers. FF7 flavor tightly integrated.

name: Counter Blitz
desc: Bant counter-manipulation — move counters between permanents, proliferate them, deal combat damage to snowball. FF10 flavor with Summons and Blitzball.

name: Scions & Spellcraft
desc: Esper spellslinger-control. Y'shtola drains life on big noncreature spells, drawing you four cards per rotation through the right setup. FF14 flavor.

name: Jeskai Striker
desc: Spellslinger tempo in Jeskai colors — no dragon tribal despite the set. Triggers off noncreature spells with Flurry-based payoffs. Strong Prepared synergies.

name: Abzan Armor
desc: Abzan defenders/toughness midrange. Felothar sacrifices creatures for card draw equal to toughness. Doran-inspired.

name: Sultai Arisen
desc: Sultai graveyard value with leaves-the-graveyard triggers. Kotis returns as a zombie druid; Teval is the clan's Spirit Dragon.

name: Mardu Surge
desc: Mardu token-sacrifice aggro. Make attackers, swing in, sacrifice them for value. Zurgo leads the new Mardu clan.

name: Temur Roar
desc: Temur ramp into big dragons. Ureni is the Spirit Dragon of wisdom. The closest thing in the set to classic dragon tribal.

name: Living Energy
desc: Temur energy + artifact creatures. Saheeli generates energy on artifact casts; Pia spends it on flying Aetherjet vehicle tokens. Kaladesh flavor on steroids.

name: Eternal Might
desc: Esper zombie discard with Eternalize. Naktamun (Amonkhet) flavor — draw-discard value while raising mummies.

name: Miracle Worker
desc: Esper enchantments with miracle cost reduction. Aminatou surveils each upkeep and discounts enchantments by 4 via miracle. One of the stronger precon commanders in years.

name: Death Toll
desc: Golgari delirium reanimator. Fill the graveyard, hit four card types, return big permanents. Rendmaw scales on card-type variety.

name: Jump Scare!
desc: Simic manifest dread and landfall. Flip face-down cards at instant speed, churn the library for value. The original Zimone, before the 2026 Quandrix version.

name: Endless Punishment
desc: Rakdos group-slug. Constantly deal damage to everyone; Valgavoth grows and devours opponents' fallen souls. Pure attrition villainy.

name: Family Matters
desc: Jeskai Offspring go-wide. Drop a little extra mana on cast for a 1/1 token copy. Zinnia makes Offspring for any creature in your deck for two mana.

name: Squirreled Away
desc: Golgari squirrel tribal with token mana. Tap tokens for any color to fuel bigger spells. Best reprint value of the Bloomburrow cycle — Chatterfang, Saw in Half, Beledros Witherbloom.

name: Animated Army
desc: Gruul artifact/enchantment animator. Non-equipment artifacts and non-aura enchantments of MV 4+ become 4/4 indestructible hasty elementals. Novel build-around.

name: Peace Offering
desc: Bant group-hug with +1/+1 counters. Ms. Bumbleflower gives opponents cards but counters and evasion go to you. Rare win-con group-hug.

name: Animus Antiquity
desc: Bant historic-matters. Sagas, artifacts, legendaries trigger Eivor. Viking flavor from Assassin's Creed Valhalla.

name: Master of Keys
desc: Grixis exile-matters with Freerunning mechanic (prowess-lite). Hit-and-run aggro with unblockable triggers.

name: Creative Energy
desc: Jeskai energy + artifacts. Generate energy, spend for card draw, creatures, burn. A fresh mechanic finally in Commander.

name: Eldrazi Incursion
desc: Five-color colorless Eldrazi. Ulalek uses colorless-hybrid mana and copies Eldrazi spells and triggered abilities. Ramp into apocalypse.

name: Graveyard Overdrive
desc: Jund Lhurgoyf tribal. Disa makes Tarmogoyf tokens from your graveyard. Many players prefer Coram as commander for flexibility.

name: Tricky Terrain
desc: Simic lands-matter with 'everything counters.' Omo puts a counter that gives a land all land types. Urzatron and gates synergy.

name: Most Wanted
desc: Mardu outlaw tribal + treasure. Hire Assassins/Mercenaries/Pirates/Rogues/Warlocks. Vihaan animates treasures into 3/3 outlaws.

name: Grand Larceny
desc: Sultai theft. Exile opponents' cards when doing combat damage, cast them at a discount. Chaos politics.

name: Quick Draw
desc: Izzet spells-per-turn spellslinger. Plot mechanic for instant-speed tempo plays. Copies instants and sorceries when you cast multiple in a turn.

name: Desert Bloom
desc: Naya Desert lands-matter. Discard lands early, bring them back, create Plant armies. Yuma gets cheaper for every land in your graveyard.

name: Scrappy Survivors
desc: Naya voltron with auras and equipment. Dogmeat mills for auras/equipment, creates Junk tokens for impulse draw. Preston is the aura-focused alternate.

name: Mutant Menace
desc: Sultai rad counters and proliferate. Distribute rad to opponents to mill them and buff your mutants. New mechanic exclusive to this set.

name: Hail, Caesar
desc: Mardu go-wide aggro with Caesar's Legion theme. Human soldier tribal, token armies, modal combat triggers.

name: Science!
desc: Jeskai energy + artifacts. Generate energy on artifact casts, play pre-war technology, assemble Liberty Prime and crush the enemy.

name: Deep Clue Sea
desc: Azorius clues and face-down cards. Kaust cheats morph creatures out at reduced cost. Investigate synergies throughout.

name: Revenant Recon
desc: Dimir surveil + finality-counter reanimator. Cards with finality counters recurse in new ways. Grave interaction without infinite loops.

name: Blame Game
desc: Mardu goad tribal. Suspect creatures, force attacks, draw cards off the chaos. Nelly's goading snowballs across the table.

name: Deadly Disguise
desc: Naya face-down matters — disguise, morph, megamorph, manifest. Flip creatures up for combat blowouts.

name: Ahoy Mateys
desc: Grixis Pirate tribal. Cast cards opponents own when plundering, treasure production, raid triggers.

name: Veloci-Ramp-Tor
desc: Gruul Dinosaurs with Discover mechanic. Cascade-like triggers cheat big stompy creatures into play.

name: Blood Rites
desc: Orzhov Vampires. Sacrifice fodder for Vampire tokens, Clavileño turns creatures into a growing army.

name: Explorers of the Deep
desc: Bant Merfolk and Explore mechanic. Explore triggers grow the board and filter draws simultaneously.

name: Blast from the Past
desc: Izzet historic-matters with Doctor/companion partner system. First through Fourth Doctors plus companions. Time Lord flavor peaks here.

name: Timey-Wimey
desc: Simic time-counter shenanigans. Suspend cards, proliferate time counters, cast for free.

name: Paradox Power
desc: Temur new Doctors (9 through 12). Flicker effects, ETB value, Tenth Doctor partnerships with Rose/Donna/Martha.

name: Masters of Evil
desc: Esper villain tribal — The Master, Daleks, Cybermen. Villainous Choice mechanic gives opponents bad options.

name: Virtue and Valor
desc: Boros Knights and Food tokens. Aggro backed by sustained life to push through late-game blockers.

name: Fae Dominion
desc: Dimir Faerie flying tribal. Instant-speed plays, pingers in the air, Talion punishes wrong-name guesses.

name: Peace Offering
desc: Selesnya Roles and Auras. Create Role tokens, pump them up, swing wide with enchanted creatures.

name: Faerie Schemes
desc: Grixis wicked-fae politics. Offer Celebrations to opponents, force bad decisions, collect on mistakes.

name: Sliver Swarm
desc: Five-color sliver tribal with graveyard recursion. Sliver Gravemother lets slivers escape repeatedly. Contains staples; priced accordingly.

name: Eldrazi Unbound
desc: Colorless eldrazi ramp. Wastes tribal that swings into Annihilator. Includes Eldrazi Temple, Sensei's Divining Top.

name: Enduring Enchantments
desc: Esper enchantress constellation. Turn your enchantments into creature tokens, weaponize the graveyard.

name: Planeswalker Party
desc: Jeskai superfriends. Planeswalker tribal with emblems and ultimate triggers as a core theme.

name: The Hosts of Mordor
set: The Lord of the Rings: Tales of Middle-earth
desc: Rakdos orcs and amass. The Ring-tempt mechanic pressures life totals. Iconic IP, beloved precon.

name: Food and Fellowship
set: The Lord of the Rings: Tales of Middle-earth
desc: Selesnya Hobbits and Food. Lifegain tribal with creature tokens. Second-breakfast jokes canonized.

name: Elven Council
set: The Lord of the Rings: Tales of Middle-earth
desc: Bant elves tribal. Elrond, Arwen, Legolas support. Scry-heavy card filtering with token production.

name: Riders of Rohan
set: The Lord of the Rings: Tales of Middle-earth
desc: Boros human soldiers with battle-cry triggers. Equipment, go-wide aggression, heroic tempo shell.

name: Call for Backup
desc: Naya +1/+1 counters with the Backup mechanic. Shalai and Hallar turn counter placement into direct damage.

name: Divine Convocation
desc: Jeskai convoke + creature tokens. Tap tiny creatures to cast big spells. Saint Traft is often the better commander option.

name: Growing Threat
desc: Orzhov phyrexian + Incubator tokens. Brimaz creates Incubators that flip into big phyrexians. Moira and Teshar enable a historic-reanimator alternate.

name: Cavalry Charge
desc: Esper Knights with horsemanship. Knight tribal in three colors, vampire knight subtheme via Elenda & Azor.

name: Tinker Time
desc: Temur artifact tokens. Clues, Food, Blood, Treasures all care about unique types. Rashmi and Ragavan steal spells for free.

name: Rebellion Rising
desc: Boros Mirran survivors. Go wide, double-strike, equip, smash through Phyrexia's horrors.

name: Corrupting Influence
desc: Golgari poison counters. Toxic creatures and proliferate aim at 10 poison as an alternate win condition.

name: Urza's Iron Alliance
desc: Jeskai soldiers + artifacts. Brothers' War era. Affinity-adjacent with strong card selection.

name: Mishra's Burnished Banner
desc: Jund artifact sacrifice. Mishra draws cards and unearth enables recursion. Junk-pile aesthetic.

name: Forces of the Imperium
desc: Esper Space Marines / Imperium humans tribal. Heroic combat and protective counter-magic.

name: Necron Dynasties
desc: Mono-black Necron artifact horde. Reanimate, sacrifice, flood the board with undying robot-aliens.

name: Tyranid Swarm
desc: Jund Tyranid tokens + counters. Swarm goes wide then wide-and-tall as Swarmlord hands out upgrades.

name: The Ruinous Powers
desc: Four-color chaos demons. Cascade triggers on combat damage — swing once, cast chaos.

name: Legends' Legacy
desc: Mardu legendary tribal. Every legendary triggers Dihada for card filtering and tokens.

name: Painbow
desc: Five-color pain-lands shell. Domain counting, monarch/initiative subthemes.

name: Party Time
set: Commander Legends: Battle for Baldur's Gate
desc: Bant adventure party tribal. Match the four D&D party roles (cleric/fighter/rogue/wizard) for buffs.

name: Mind Flayarrrs
set: Commander Legends: Battle for Baldur's Gate
desc: Dimir horror tribal with mill. Reanimate from opponents' graveyards after milling them into submission.

name: Exit from Exile
set: Commander Legends: Battle for Baldur's Gate
desc: Gruul exile-cast wolves. Impulse draw from top of library, cast werewolves at instant speed, grow the pack.

name: Draconic Dissent
set: Commander Legends: Battle for Baldur's Gate
desc: Jeskai dragon goad. Force opponents to attack each other with dragons, capitalize on the openings.

name: Obscura Operation
desc: Esper connive — draw and discard in one motion. Anhelo copies your first instant or sorcery each turn.

name: Maestros Massacre
desc: Grixis spellslinger with casualty. Sacrifice creatures on cast to copy instants and sorceries.

name: Riveteers Rampage
desc: Jund blitz — cast creatures cheap, die at turn's end, sacrifice for value.

name: Cabaretti Cacophony
desc: Naya token party. Cats, Dogs, anything wide. Kitt Kanto rides whatever you can assemble.

name: Bedecked Brokers
desc: Bant shield counters. Counters protect creatures and offer utility trade-ins. Slow, resilient, deliberate.

name: Upgrades Unleashed
desc: Jeskai vehicles and equipment. Crew things, swing things, go tall in a deck type that rarely gets love.

name: Buckle Up
desc: Naya modified creatures (counters, equipment, auras). Chishiro makes Spirit tokens when modified creatures die.

name: Take Flight
desc: Azorius flying tribal. Beginner-friendly with a clear game plan: fly over, swing through the air, draw cards on attacks.

name: Grave Danger
desc: Dimir mill/reanimator starter. Mill opponents, bring back their best creatures as your own.

name: Token Triumph
desc: Selesnya token go-wide. Beginner-friendly with a clear game plan, significantly power-crept by 2026 but a good chassis.

name: Chaos Incarnate
desc: Grixis control villain deck. Bolas steals things, burns things, counters things. Classic mustache-twirling.

name: Draconic Domination
desc: Five-color dragon tribal led by the OG. A useful benchmark for 5C dragon tribal at real-deck prices.

name: Vampiric Bloodlust
desc: Rakdos vampire tribal with blood tokens. Drain, aggro, vampire swarm — Crimson Vow's signature theme.

name: Spirit Squadron
desc: Azorius spirit flying tribal. Go-wide in the air with grave-return payoffs.

name: Coven Counters
desc: Selesnya human/coven tribal. Coven triggers (three creatures of different power) reward board diversity.

name: Undead Unleashed
desc: Dimir zombie decay. Wilhelt turns every dying zombie into a new one, self-perpetuating threat density.

name: Aura of Courage
desc: Bant Voltron auras/equipment. Galea lets you play enchantments and equipment from the top of your library for free.

name: Dungeons of Death
desc: Mono-black dungeon adventure. Venture into dungeons when creatures die for escalating value.

name: Draconic Rage
desc: Gruul dragon tribal. Take damage to trigger elementals and dragons, brute-force Jund-style.

name: Planar Portal
desc: Rakdos impulse draw and treasure. Prosper exiles cards from top of library, casts them, pays with treasures.

name: Silverquill Statement
desc: Orzhov political. Breena draws cards and doubles counters when opponents attack each other. The OG Strixhaven precon.

name: Prismari Performance
desc: Izzet spells-matter. Zaffai scales rewards with spell mana value — cast big, get huge triggers.

name: Witherbloom Witchcraft
desc: Golgari life-as-resource. Pay life to grow Willowdusk, then hand those counters to your biggest threat.

name: Lorehold Legacies
desc: Boros artifact recursion. Sacrifice artifacts to make two copies. Dramatic Reversal-Isochron pieces included.

name: Quantum Quandrix
desc: Simic token doubling. Parallel Lives in the command zone. The original Quandrix precon before 2026's Unlimited.
